'''N.J. Opuh''' was a [[Bardottan/Legends|Phuii]] frequenter of [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]] district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="FF54">{{FactFile|54|COR 23-26|Coruscant – Dex's Diner}}</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The Phuii visited while the diner was active during or after [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]] to between [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]].<ref name="DexEra">{{FactFile|54|COR 23-26|Coruscant – Dex's Diner}} states that [[Didi Oddo]] gave up his café four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn's]] [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}}, which includes Jinn's death, to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Therefore, [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] must have owned the building some point during or after around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]]. ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' states that [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes was [[Declaration of a New Order|formed]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of the novel to around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]. Therefore, Dex's Diner was destroyed between 19 BBY and 18 BBY.</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
N.J. Opuh was stated to appear in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], but did not make to the final cut. He was based on [[Mars Guo/Legends|Mars Guo]], much as [[Slyther Bushforb/Legends|Slyther Bushforb]] was based on [[Ark Roose/Legends|Ark Roose]].
